$comment: BecomeChampion Rules Pack - Tyranids (10th Edition). Generated from 10e CSV data. Includes core Tyranid detachments and datasheets from the Tyranids faction pack and Forge World sources; not official rules text.
author: Community
source_note: Generated from current 10e CSV exports. This pack includes Tyranid detachments Invasion Fleet, Crusher Stampede, Unending Swarm, Assimilation Swarm, Vanguard Onslaught, Synaptic Nexus plus standard Core Stratagems. Boarding Actions detachments are intentionally excluded. Rules text is extracted and normalized for in-app prompting; check official publications for authoritative wording.

abilities.name: Overgrown Barbs
abilities.timing: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding TITANIC units) that was hit by one or more of those attacks
abilities.summary: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding TITANIC units) that was hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next turn, while this model is on the battlefield, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Disruption Bombardment
abilities.timing: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy INFANTRY unit hit by one or more of those attacks
abilities.summary: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy INFANTRY unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of your opponent’s next turn, that enemy unit is disrupted. While a unit is disrupted, subtract 2 from its Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Advance and Charge rolls made for it.

abilities.name: Seed Spore Mines
abilities.timing: in your Shooting phase, when selected to shoot, one unit with this ability can use it instead of making any attacks with its ranged weapons
abilities.summary: Once per turn, in your Shooting phase, when selected to shoot, one unit with this ability can use it instead of making any attacks with its ranged weapons. If it does, you can add one new Spore Mines unit to your army and set it up anywhere on the battlefield that is wholly within 48" of this unit and more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy units. That SPORE MINES unit contains 1 model for each model in this unit.

abilities.name: Vicious Insight
abilities.timing: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability
abilities.summary: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

abilities.name: Hypnotic Gaze (Psychic)
abilities.timing: Fight phase, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model
abilities.summary: At the start of the Fight phase, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Blistering Assault
abilities.timing: Each time an enemy unit is selected to shoot, after that unit has shot, if any models from this unit lost one or more wo
abilities.summary: Each time an enemy unit is selected to shoot, after that unit has shot, if any models from this unit lost one or more wounds as a result of those attacks, this unit can make a Blistering Assault move. If it does, roll one D6, adding 2 to the result: each model in this unit can be moved a distance in inches up to the result, but this unit must finish that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit. When doing so, those models can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit. Each unit can only make one Blistering Assault move per phase.

abilities.name: Feeder Tendrils
abilities.timing: Each time this model destroys an enemy CHARACTER model, you gain 1CP.
abilities.summary: Each time this model destroys an enemy CHARACTER model, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Fear of the Unseen (Aura)
abilities.timing: Battle-shock step of your opponent’s Command phase, if such an enemy unit is below its Starting Strength, it must take a Battle-shock test
abilities.summary: While an enemy unit is within 6" of this model, worsen the Leadership characteristic of models in that unit by 1. In addition, in the Battle-shock step of your opponent’s Command phase, if such an enemy unit is below its Starting Strength, it must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Digestion Spine
abilities.timing: Each time this model fights, after it has resolved its attacks, if one or more enemy models (excluding VEHICLE models) w
abilities.summary: Each time this model fights, after it has resolved its attacks, if one or more enemy models (excluding VEHICLE models) were destroyed as the result of those attacks, this model regains up to D3 wounds.

abilities.name: Symbiotic Targeting
abilities.timing: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks
abilities.summary: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly TYRANIDS model makes an attack that targets that unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

abilities.name: Winged Swarm
abilities.timing: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6"
abilities.summary: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6". If it does, until the end of the turn, this unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

abilities.name: Vanguard Predator
abilities.timing: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If the target is within range of one or more ob
abilities.summary: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If the target is within range of one or more objective markers, re-roll a Wound roll of 1 as well.

abilities.name: Spore Mine Cysts
abilities.timing: Each time this model ends a Normal move, you can select one of the following: - Select one enemy unit it moved over duri
abilities.summary:
Each time this model ends a Normal move, you can select one of the following:
- Select one enemy unit it moved over during that move and roll six D6: for each 3+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.
- Add one new Spore Mines unit containing D3 models to your army and set it up anywhere on the battlefield that is wholly within 6" of this model and more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy units. You cannot select this option for more than one model per turn.

abilities.name: Frenzied Metabolism
abilities.timing: Each time this model is selected to shoot, you can use this ability. If you do, until the end of the phase, each time th
abilities.summary: Each time this model is selected to shoot, you can use this ability. If you do, until the end of the phase, each time this model makes an attack, add 1 to the Wound roll. After resolving those attacks, roll one D6: on a 2+, this model suffers D3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Grisly Spectacle
abilities.timing: Battle-shock test
abilities.summary: Each time this model is selected to fight, after resolving its attacks, if one or more enemy units were destroyed by those attacks, each enemy unit within 6" of this model must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Apex-beast
abilities.timing: Battle-shocked, add 1 to the Hit roll
abilities.summary: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a unit that is Battle-shocked, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Stalking Forward
abilities.timing: Each time this model makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move over models (excluding TITANIC models) and t
abilities.summary: Each time this model makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move over models (excluding TITANIC models) and terrain features that are 4" or less in height as if they were not there.

abilities.name: Airborne Predator
abilities.timing: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that can FLY , add 1 to the Hit roll.
abilities.summary: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that can FLY , add 1 to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Defensive Stance
abilities.timing: Each time you target this unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem, while resolving that Stratagem, hits are scored on unm
abilities.summary: Each time you target this unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem, while resolving that Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+, or unmodified Hit rolls of 4+ instead if this unit is within range of an objective marker.

abilities.name: Will of the Hive Mind
abilities.timing: Once per battle round, one model from your army with this ability can use it when a friendly TYRANIDS unit within 12" of
abilities.summary: Once per battle round, one model from your army with this ability can use it when a friendly TYRANIDS unit within 12" of that model is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that usage of that Stratagem by 1CP.

abilities.name: Onslaught (Aura, Psychic)
abilities.timing: While a friendly TYRANIDS unit is within 6" of this model, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [ASSA
abilities.summary: While a friendly TYRANIDS unit is within 6" of this model, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [ASSAULT] and [LETHAL HITS] abilities.

abilities.name: Bounding Leap
abilities.timing: This unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.
abilities.summary: This unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

abilities.name: Alpha Invader
abilities.timing: Weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.
abilities.summary: Weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

abilities.name: Hypersensory Array
abilities.timing: Once per battle round, you can target this unit with the Rapid Ingress or Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP, and can
abilities.summary: Once per battle round, you can target this unit with the Rapid Ingress or Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this turn.

abilities.name: Feeder Tendrils
abilities.timing: Each time this model destroys an enemy CHARACTER model, you gain 1CP.
abilities.summary: Each time this model destroys an enemy CHARACTER model, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Pheromone Trail
abilities.timing: Once per battle round, you can target one model with this ability with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP.
abilities.summary: Once per battle round, you can target one model with this ability with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP.

abilities.name: Enhanced Toxic Miasma
abilities.timing: While this model is leading a unit, the range of that unit’s Foul Spores Aura ability is increased to 9"
abilities.summary: While this model is leading a unit, the range of that unit’s Foul Spores Aura ability is increased to 9".

abilities.name: Prey Adaptation
abilities.timing: Each time this model's unit is selected to fight, select one of the following abilities to apply to all melee weapons eq
abilities.summary:
Each time this model's unit is selected to fight, select one of the following abilities to apply to all melee weapons equipped by models in that unit until the end of the phase:
- [SUSTAINED HITS 1]
- [LANCE]
- [LETHAL HITS]

abilities.name: Encephalic Diffusion (Aura, Psychic)
abilities.timing: While an enemy unit is within 6" of this model, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit
abilities.summary: While an enemy unit is within 6" of this model, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll, and, if that enemy unit is Below Half-strength, subtract 1 from the Wound roll as well.

abilities.name: Terror From The Deep
abilities.timing: Battle-shock test
abilities.summary: Each time this model is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, roll one D6 for each enemy unit within 12" of this model: on a 2-4, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 5+, that unit suffers 3 mortal wounds and must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Bio-minefield
abilities.timing: Enemy units cannot start or end an Advance move within 6" of this unit.
abilities.summary: Enemy units cannot start or end an Advance move within 6" of this unit.

abilities.name: Floating Death
abilities.timing: Each time this unit or an enemy unit ends a move, for each model in this unit that is within 3" of one or more enemy uni
abilities.summary: Each time this unit or an enemy unit ends a move, for each model in this unit that is within 3" of one or more enemy units, select one of those enemy units. That model in this unit is destroyed, then roll one D6: on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers D6 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Neurocytes
abilities.timing: While this unit is within Synapse Range of a friendly TYRANIDS unit (excluding NEUROGAUNT units), it has the Synapse keyword
abilities.summary: While this unit is within Synapse Range of a friendly TYRANIDS unit (excluding NEUROGAUNT units), it has the Synapse keyword.

abilities.name: Feeder Tendrils
abilities.timing: Each time this model destroys an enemy CHARACTER model, you gain 1CP.
abilities.summary: Each time this model destroys an enemy CHARACTER model, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Neural Disruption
abilities.timing: In your Command phase, select one enemy unit within 12" of this model
abilities.summary: In your Command phase, select one enemy unit within 12" of this model. That unit must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Psychological Saboteur (Aura)
abilities.timing: Battle-shocked: - Each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll
abilities.summary:
While an enemy unit is within 12" of this model, if that unit is Battle-shocked:
- Each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
- Each time a friendly TYRANIDS model makes an attack that targets that unit, add 1 to the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Node Lash (Psychic)
abilities.timing: Battle-shocked, add 1 to the Wound roll as well
abilities.summary: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. If the target is Battle-shocked, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

abilities.name: Psychic Terror (Psychic)
abilities.timing: Battle-shock test each enemy unit on the battlefield must take as a result
abilities.summary: If one or more models from your army with this ability are on the battlefield when you unleash the Shadow in the Warp, subtract 1 from the Battle-shock test each enemy unit on the battlefield must take as a result.

abilities.name: Neuroloids
abilities.timing: In your Command phase, you can select up to two friendly TYRANIDS units within 18" of this model’s unit
abilities.summary:
In your Command phase, you can select up to two friendly TYRANIDS units within 18" of this model’s unit. Until the start of your next Command phase, the selected units are always considered to be within Synapse Range of your army.
Designer’s Note: Place a Neuroloid token next to each selected unit to remind you.

abilities.name: Singular Purpose
abilities.timing: while this model is within range of that objective marker, it has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability and an Objective Control characteristic of 15
abilities.summary:
At the start of the first battle round, select one of the following:
- Select one enemy unit. Until the end of the battle, each time this model makes an attack that targets that unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.
- Select one objective marker. Until the end of the battle, while this model is within range of that objective marker, it has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability and an Objective Control characteristic of 15.

abilities.name: Harpoon Barbs
abilities.timing: Once per turn, when an enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model is selected to Fall Back, roll one D6: on a 2+,
abilities.summary: Once per turn, when an enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model is selected to Fall Back, roll one D6: on a 2+, that unit suffers D6 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Harpooned
abilities.timing: After the bearer has shot with this weapon, select one enemy MONSTER or VEHICLE unit hit by one or more of those attacks
abilities.summary: After the bearer has shot with this weapon, select one enemy MONSTER or VEHICLE unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the turn, each time the bearer selects that unit as a target of a charge, add 2 to the Charge roll.

abilities.name: Singular Purpose
abilities.timing: while this model is within range of that objective marker, it has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability and an Objective Control characteristic of 15
abilities.summary:
At the start of the first battle round, select one of the following:
- Select one enemy unit. Until the end of the battle, each time this model makes an attack that targets that unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.
- Select one objective marker. Until the end of the battle, while this model is within range of that objective marker, it has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability and an Objective Control characteristic of 15.

abilities.name: Unnatural Resilience
abilities.timing: This model has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against mortal wounds.
abilities.summary: This model has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Alpha Leader
abilities.timing: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll
abilities.summary: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Unstoppable Monster
abilities.timing: At the start of each player’s Command phase, this model regains up to D3 lost wounds.
abilities.summary: At the start of each player’s Command phase, this model regains up to D3 lost wounds.

abilities.name: Parasitic Infection
abilities.timing: Each time an INFANTRY model is destroyed by an attack made with this model’s barbed ovipositor, after this model has fin
abilities.summary: Each time an INFANTRY model is destroyed by an attack made with this model’s barbed ovipositor, after this model has finished making its attacks, you can add one new Ripper Swarms unit to your army consisting of D3 models and set it up within 3" of this model. If you do, that RIPPER SWARMS unit can be set up within Engagement Range of the destroyed model’s unit (but not within Engagement Range of any other enemy units).

abilities.name: It Itches!
abilities.timing: Fight phase, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model
abilities.summary: At the start of the Fight phase, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Bio-stimulus
abilities.timing: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks
abilities.summary: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the turn, each time a friendly TYRANIDS unit makes a melee attack that targets that enemy unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. The same enemy unit can only be affected by this ability once per turn.

abilities.name: Feeding Frenzy
abilities.timing: Each time this model makes a melee attack that targets a unit that is below its Starting Strength, add 1 to the Hit roll
abilities.summary: Each time this model makes a melee attack that targets a unit that is below its Starting Strength, add 1 to the Hit roll. If that target is also Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

abilities.name: Burning Spray
abilities.timing: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks
abilities.summary: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, that enemy unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

abilities.name: Death From Below
abilities.timing: At the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves
abilities.summary: At the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Chitinous Horrors (Aura)
abilities.timing: While an enemy unit is within Engagement Range of this unit, halve the Objective Control characteristic of models in tha
abilities.summary: While an enemy unit is within Engagement Range of this unit, halve the Objective Control characteristic of models in that enemy unit.

abilities.name: Death Scream
abilities.timing: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one unit hit by one or more of those attacks
abilities.summary: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test.

abilities.name: Irresistible Force
abilities.timing: This model is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.
abilities.summary: This model is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

abilities.name: Chitinous Horrors
abilities.timing: While an enemy unit is within Engagement Range of one or more units with this ability, halve the Objective Control chara
abilities.summary: While an enemy unit is within Engagement Range of one or more units with this ability, halve the Objective Control characteristic of models in that enemy unit.

abilities.name: Bio-minefield
abilities.timing: Enemy units cannot start or end an Advance move within 6" of this unit.
abilities.summary: Enemy units cannot start or end an Advance move within 6" of this unit.

abilities.name: Floating Death
abilities.timing: Each time this unit or an enemy unit ends a move, for each model in this unit that is within 3" of one or more enemy uni
abilities.summary: Each time this unit or an enemy unit ends a move, for each model in this unit that is within 3" of one or more enemy units, select one of those enemy units. That model in this unit is destroyed, then roll one D6: on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Seed Mucolids
abilities.timing: in your Shooting phase, when selected to shoot, one unit with this ability can use it instead of making any attacks with its ranged weapons
abilities.summary: Once per turn, in your Shooting phase, when selected to shoot, one unit with this ability can use it instead of making any attacks with its ranged weapons. If it does, you can add one new Mucolid Spores unit containing 1 model to your army and set it up anywhere on the battlefield that is wholly within 18" of this model and more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy units.

abilities.name: Hive Defences
abilities.timing: You can target this model with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a d
abilities.summary: You can target this model with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this turn. This model can only be targeted with that Stratagem once per turn.

abilities.name: Skulking Horrors
abilities.timing: Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of this unit, if this unit is not w
abilities.summary: Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of this unit, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to D6".

abilities.name: Spawn Termagants
abilities.timing: In your Command phase, you can select one friendly Termagants unit within 6" of this model and return up to D3+3 destroyed models to that unit
abilities.summary: In your Command phase, you can select one friendly Termagants unit within 6" of this model and return up to D3+3 destroyed models to that unit. A TERMAGANTS unit cannot be selected for this ability more than once per phase.

abilities.name: Brood Progenitor (Aura, Psychic)
abilities.timing: While a friendly Termagants unit is within 6" of this model, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LE
abilities.summary: While a friendly Termagants unit is within 6" of this model, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

abilities.name: Hive Commander
abilities.timing: At the start of your Command phase, if this model is on the battlefield, you gain 1CP
abilities.summary: At the start of your Command phase, if this model is on the battlefield, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Malign Presence (Aura)
abilities.timing: If this model is your WARLORD , each time your opponent targets a unit from their army with a Stratagem, if that unit is
abilities.summary:
If this model is your WARLORD , each time your opponent targets a unit from their army with a Stratagem, if that unit is within 12" of this model, increase the cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.
Designer’s Note: This ability takes precedence over the Lord of Deceit ability presented in the Balance Dataslate June 2024.

abilities.name: Domination of the Hive Mind (Aura)
abilities.timing: in your army’s Synapse Range
abilities.summary: While a friendly TYRANIDS unit is within 9" of this model, that unit is within your army’s Synapse Range.

abilities.name: Grasping Tendrils
abilities.timing: Each time an enemy unit (excluding TITANIC units) within Engagement Range of one or more units from your army with this
abilities.summary: Each time an enemy unit (excluding TITANIC units) within Engagement Range of one or more units from your army with this ability is selected to Fall Back, you can roll one D6: on a 3+, that enemy unit must Remain Stationary instead.

abilities.name: Hypertoxic Miasma (Aura)
abilities.timing: At the end of your Movement phase, roll one D6 for each enemy unit within 6" of this model: on a 2-3, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound; on a 4-5, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that unit suffers D6 mortal wounds
abilities.summary: At the end of your Movement phase, roll one D6 for each enemy unit within 6" of this model: on a 2-3, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound; on a 4-5, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that unit suffers D6 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Subterranean Tunnels
abilities.timing: In your Movement phase, when this model is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, it can use a subterranean tunnel
abilities.summary: In your Movement phase, when this model is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, it can use a subterranean tunnel. If it does, this model can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units, but until the end of the turn, it is not eligible to declare a charge.

abilities.name: Alpha Warrior
abilities.timing: Weapons equipped by models in this model’s unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.
abilities.summary: Weapons equipped by models in this model’s unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

abilities.name: Aggressive Leader-beast
abilities.timing: In your opponent’s Shooting phase, each time an enemy unit has shot, if any models from this unit were destroyed as a result of those attacks, this unit can make a Surge move
abilities.summary: In your opponent’s Shooting phase, each time an enemy unit has shot, if any models from this unit were destroyed as a result of those attacks, this unit can make a Surge move. To do so, roll one D6: models in this unit move a number of inches up to this result, but this unit must end that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit (excluding AIRCRAFT ). When doing so, those models can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit. This unit cannot make a Surge move while it is Battle-shocked or within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, and can only make one Surge move per phase.

abilities.name: Adaptive Instincts
abilities.timing: Fight phase, select one of the following: - Aggression Imperative: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1
abilities.summary:
At the start of the Fight phase, select one of the following:
- Aggression Imperative: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.
- Bioregeneration: Until the end of the phase, each time a saving throw is made for a model in this unit, re-roll a saving throw of 1.

abilities.name: Adaptable Predators
abilities.timing: This unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.
abilities.summary: This unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

abilities.name: Aerial Seeding
abilities.timing: Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules
abilities.summary: This model must start the battle in Reserves, but neither it nor any units embarked within it are counted towards any limits placed on the maximum number of Reserves units you can start the battle with. This model can be set up in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules. Any units embarked within this model must immediately disembark after it has been set up on the battlefield, and they must be set up more than 9" away from all enemy models. After this model has been set up on the battlefield, no units can embark within it.

abilities.name: Resilient Organism
abilities.timing: Once per battle, when an attack is allocated to this model, you can change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0
abilities.summary: Once per battle, when an attack is allocated to this model, you can change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

abilities.name: Guardian Organism
abilities.timing: While a Character model is leading this unit, that CHARACTER has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.
abilities.summary: While a Character model is leading this unit, that CHARACTER has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

abilities.name: Foul Spores (Aura)
abilities.timing: While a friendly TYRANIDS unit is within 6" of this unit, each time a ranged attack targets that unit, models in that un
abilities.summary: While a friendly TYRANIDS unit is within 6" of this unit, each time a ranged attack targets that unit, models in that unit have the Benefit of Cover against that attack. In addition, while a friendly TYRANIDS unit (excluding Monsters) is within 6" of this unit, models in that unit have the Stealth ability.

abilities.name: Pouncing Leap
abilities.timing: You can target this unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already used tha
abilities.summary: You can target this unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already used that Stratagem on a different unit this phase.

abilities.name: Will of the Hive Mind
abilities.timing: Once per battle round, one model from your army with this ability can use it when a friendly TYRANIDS unit within 12" of
abilities.summary: Once per battle round, one model from your army with this ability can use it when a friendly TYRANIDS unit within 12" of that model is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that usage of that Stratagem by 1CP.

abilities.name: Paroxysm (Psychic)
abilities.timing: Fight phase, you can select one enemy unit within 12" of and visible to this model and roll one D6: on a 1, this PSYKER suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 2+, until the end of the phase, subtract 1 from the Attacks characteristic of weapons equipped by models in that unit
abilities.summary: At the start of the Fight phase, you can select one enemy unit within 12" of and visible to this model and roll one D6: on a 1, this PSYKER suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 2+, until the end of the phase, subtract 1 from the Attacks characteristic of weapons equipped by models in that unit.

abilities.name: Alpha Warrior
abilities.timing: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability
abilities.summary: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

abilities.name: Death Blow
abilities.timing: If this model is destroyed by a melee attack, if it has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove it fr
abilities.summary: If this model is destroyed by a melee attack, if it has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

abilities.name: Spirit Leech (Aura, Psychic)
abilities.timing: Battle-shock test, it suffers D3 mortal wounds and one model in this unit regains up to D3 lost wounds
abilities.summary: While an enemy unit is within 6" of this unit, if this unit contains a Neurothrope, each time that enemy unit fails a Battle-shock test, it suffers D3 mortal wounds and one model in this unit regains up to D3 lost wounds.

abilities.name: Warp Field (Aura, Psychic)
abilities.timing: While a friendly Tyranids unit is within 6" of this unit, models in that unit have a 6+ invulnerable save.
abilities.summary: While a friendly Tyranids unit is within 6" of this unit, models in that unit have a 6+ invulnerable save.

stratagems.name: GO TO GROUND
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One INFANTRY unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, all models in your unit have a 6+ invulnerable save and have the Benefit of Cover.

stratagems.name: COMMAND RE-ROLL
stratagems.timing: Any phase, just after you make an Advance roll, a Charge roll, a Desperate Escape test or a Hazardous test for a unit from your army, or a Hit roll, a Wound roll, a Damage roll or a saving throw for a model in that unit, or a roll to determine the number of attacks made with a weapon equipped by a model in that unit. If you are using fast dice rolling, this Stratagem can still be used after rolling multiple rolls or saving throws at once.
stratagems.target: That unit or model from your army.
stratagems.effect: You re-roll that roll, test or saving throw. If you are using fast dice rolling, select one of those rolls or saving throws to re-roll.

stratagems.name: EPIC CHALLENGE
stratagems.timing: Fight phase, when a CHARACTER unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more Attached units is selected to fight.
stratagems.target: One CHARACTER model in your unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, all melee attacks made by that model have the [PRECISION] ability.

stratagems.name: INSANE BRAVERY
stratagems.timing: Battle-shock step of your Command phase, just before you take a Battle-shock test for a unit from your army.
stratagems.target: That unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Your unit automatically passes that Battle-shock test.

stratagems.name: HEROIC INTERVENTION
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Charge phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Charge move.
stratagems.target: One unit from your army that is within 6" of that enemy unit and would be eligible to declare a charge against that enemy unit if it were your Charge phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit now declares a charge that targets only that enemy unit, and you resolve that charge as if it were your Charge phase.

stratagems.name: FIRE OVERWATCH
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Movement or Charge phase, just after an enemy unit is set up or when an enemy unit starts or ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, or declares a charge.
stratagems.target: One unit from your army that is within 24" of that enemy unit and that would be eligible to shoot if it were your Shooting phase.
stratagems.effect: If that enemy unit is visible to your unit, your unit can shoot that enemy unit as if it were your Shooting phase.

stratagems.name: RAPID INGRESS
stratagems.timing: End of your opponent’s Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One unit from your army that is in Reserves.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can arrive on the battlefield as if it were the Reinforcements step of your Movement phase, and if every model in that unit has the Deep Strike ability, you can set that unit up as described in the Deep Strike ability (even though it is not your Movement phase).

stratagems.name: COUNTER-OFFENSIVE
stratagems.timing: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has fought.
stratagems.target: One unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units and that has not already been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit fights next.

stratagems.name: TANK SHOCK
stratagems.timing: Your Charge phase, just after a VEHICLE unit from your army ends a Charge move.
stratagems.target: That VEHICLE unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit, and select one VEHICLE model in your unit that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit. Roll a number of D6 equal to the Toughness characteristic of the selected VEHICLE model. For each 5+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds).

stratagems.name: SMOKESCREEN
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One SMOKE unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, all models in your unit have the Benefit of Cover and the Stealth ability.

stratagems.name: GRENADE
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One GRENADES unit from your army (excluding units that Advanced, Fell Back or have shot this turn) that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Select one GRENADES model in your unit and one enemy unit that is not within Engagement Range of any units from your army and is within 8" of and visible to your GRENADES model. Roll six D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

stratagems.name: RAPACIOUS HUNGER
stratagems.timing: Your Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS unit from your army that just destroyed an enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit immediately Regenerates (See Feed the Swarm). When doing so, if your unit is a Harvester unit and you choose for one model to regain up to D3 lost wounds, that model regains up to 3 lost wounds instead.

stratagems.name: BROODGUARD IMPULSE
stratagems.timing: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One Harvester unit from your army that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the battle, each time a friendly TYRANIDS model makes an attack that targets the enemy unit that just destroyed your HARVESTER unit, add 1 to the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: ABLATIVE CARAPACE
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One Harvester unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability. If your unit is within range of an objective marker you control, until the end of the phase models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability instead.

stratagems.name: RECLAIM BIOMASS
stratagems.timing: Any phase, when a TYRANIDS unit from your army is destroyed, before the last model in it is removed from play.
stratagems.target: One Harvester unit from your army that is within 6" of that destroyed unit.
stratagems.effect: Regenerate one friendly TYRANIDS unit within 6" of your HARVESTER unit (See Feed the Swarm).

stratagems.name: TYRANNOFORMED
stratagems.timing: Command phase.
stratagems.target: One Harvester unit from your army that is within range of an objective marker you control.
stratagems.effect: That objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn.

stratagems.name: SECURE BIOMASS
stratagems.timing: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability. If your unit is a Harvester unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, a successful unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit as well.

stratagems.name: SAVAGE ROAR
stratagems.timing: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One Tyranids Monster unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test and, until the end of the phase, each time a model in that enemy unit makes an attack that targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll. If that Battle-shock test was failed, subtract 1 from the Wound roll as well.

stratagems.name: SWARM-GUIDED SALVOES
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One Tyranids Monster unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability, and until the end of the phase each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that model’s Ballistic Skill characteristic and any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: RAMPAGING MONSTROSITIES
stratagems.timing: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One Tyranids Monster unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: MASSIVE IMPACT
stratagems.timing: Your Charge phase, just after a Tyranids Monster model from your army ends a Charge move.
stratagems.target: That TYRANIDS MONSTER model.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of your model and roll six D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

stratagems.name: UNTRAMMELLED FEROCITY
stratagems.timing: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One Tyranids Monster unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move through models (excluding TITANIC models) and sections of terrain features that are 4" or less in height. When doing so: - It can move within Engagement Range of enemy models, but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them. - It can also move through sections of terrain features that are more than 4" in height, but if it does, after its unit has moved, roll one D6: on a 1, your unit is Battle-shocked.

stratagems.name: CORROSIVE VISCERA
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after a Tyranids Monster model from your army with the Deadly Demise ability that cannot FLY is destroyed.
stratagems.target: That TYRANIDS MONSTER model. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Do not roll one D6 to determine whether mortal wounds are inflicted by your model’s Deadly Demise ability. Instead, mortal wounds are automatically inflicted.

stratagems.name: ADRENAL SURGE
stratagems.timing: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: Up to two TYRANIDS units from your army that are within Synapse Range of your army and are eligible to fight, or one other TYRANIDS unit from your army that is eligible to fight.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in any of those selected units makes an attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

stratagems.name: RAPID REGENERATION
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability. If your unit is within Synapse Range of your army, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability instead.

stratagems.name: OVERRUN
stratagems.timing: Fight phase, just before a TYRANIDS unit from your army Consolidates.
stratagems.target: That TYRANIDS unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit Consolidates, models in it can move an additional 3" as long as your unit can end that move within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units. If your unit is within Synapse Range of your army and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, instead of making that Consolidation move, it can make a Normal move of up to 6".

stratagems.name: PREDATORY IMPERATIVE
stratagems.timing: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: Up to two TYRANIDS units from your army that are within Synapse Range of your army, or one other TYRANIDS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one Hyper-adaptation. Until the start of your next Command phase, that Hyper-adaptation is active for those selected units in addition to any other that may be active for your army.

stratagems.name: ENDLESS SWARM
stratagems.timing: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: Up to two Endless Multitude units from your army that are within Synapse Range of your army, or one other ENDLESS MULTITUDE unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: You can return up to D3+3 destroyed models to each of the selected units.

stratagems.name: DEATH FRENZY
stratagems.timing: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

stratagems.name: REINFORCED HIVE NODE
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One Synapse unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: IRRESISTIBLE WILL
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One Synapse unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase, and one enemy unit within 24" of and visible to the SYNAPSE unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly TYRANIDS model makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, if the attacking model’s unit is within 6" of your SYNAPSE unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

stratagems.name: SYNAPTIC CHANNELLING
stratagems.timing: Command phase.
stratagems.target: One Synapse unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, while a friendly TYRANIDS unit is within 9" of the selected unit, that unit is within Synapse Range of your army.

stratagems.name: IMPERATIVE DOMINANCE
stratagems.timing: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS unit from your army that is within Synapse Range of your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one Synaptic Imperative, even if you have already selected that imperative this battle. Until the start of your next Command phase, that Synaptic Imperative is active for your unit instead of any other Synaptic Imperative that is active for your army.

stratagems.name: OVERRIDE INSTINCTS
stratagems.timing: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS unit from your army that is within Synapse Range of your army and made a Fall Back move this phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge this turn.

stratagems.name: THE SMOTHERING SHADOW
stratagems.timing: Any phase, just after an enemy unit fails a Battle-shock test.
stratagems.target: One Synapse unit from your army within 12" of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Roll six D6: for each 3+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

stratagems.name: SWARMING MASSES
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One Endless Multitude unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability, and If your unit contains 15 or more models, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

stratagems.name: TEEMING MASSES
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One Endless Multitude unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: BOUNDING ADVANCE
stratagems.timing: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One Endless Multitude unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit.

stratagems.name: SYNAPTIC GOADING
stratagems.timing: Any phase, just before an Endless Multitude unit from your army that is within Synapse Range of your army makes a Surge move.
stratagems.target: That ENDLESS MULTITUDE unit.
stratagems.effect: When making that Surge move, you can re-roll the D6 to determine how far your unit moves, and your unit can end that move as close as possible to the closest objective marker (instead of as close as possible to the closest enemy unit]. All other rules for making Surge moves still apply.

stratagems.name: UNENDING WAVES
stratagems.timing: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One Endless Multitude unit from your army that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Add a new unit to your army identical to your destroyed unit, in Strategic Reserves, at its Starting Strength.

stratagems.name: PRESERVATION IMPERATIVE
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One Endless Multitude unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is treated as containing fewer than five models for the purpose of the [BLAST] ability.

stratagems.name: ASSASSIN BEASTS
stratagems.timing: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One Vanguard Invader Infantry unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [PRECISION] ability.

stratagems.name: SURPRISE ASSAULT
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after a Vanguard Invader unit from your army has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: That VANGUARD INVADER unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit that was selected as the target of one or more of your unit’s attacks. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, add 1 to the Hit roll. If the Battle-shock test was failed, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

stratagems.name: UNSEEN LURKERS
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One Vanguard Invader unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18" or, if your unit has the Lone Operative ability, if the attacking model is within 6". Your opponent can select new targets for the attacking unit’s attacks.

stratagems.name: HYPERSENSORY SCILLIA
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: Up to two Vanguard Invader units from your army that are within 9" of that enemy unit, or one other Tyranids Infantry unit from your army that is within 9" of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Those selected units can each make a Normal move of up to 6".

stratagems.name: SEEDED BROODS
stratagems.timing: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS unit from your army that is in Reserves, or up to two Vanguard Invader units from your army that are in Reserves.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, for the purposes of setting up those selected units on the battlefield, treat the current battle round number as being one higher than it actually is.

stratagems.name: INVISIBLE HUNTER
stratagems.timing: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
stratagems.target: Up to two Vanguard Invader units from your army, or one Tyranids Infantry unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Remove the targeted units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves.

detachment_rules.name: Hyper-adaptations
detachment_rules.summary:
At the start of the first battle round, select one of the following Hyper-adaptations to be active for TYRANIDS units from your army until the end of the battle:
Swarming Instincts
Each time a TYRANIDS model with this Hyper-adaptation makes an attack that targets an INFANTRY or SWARM unit, that attack has the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.
Hyper-aggression
Each time a TYRANIDS model with this Hyper-adaptation makes an attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, that attack has the [LETHAL HITS] ability.
Hive Predators
Each time a TYRANIDS model with this Hyper-adaptation makes an attack that targets a CHARACTER unit, on a Critical Hit , that attack has the [PRECISION] ability.

detachment_rules.name: Enraged Behemoths
detachment_rules.summary: Each time a Tyranids Monster model from your army makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll if that model’s unit is below its Starting Strength, and add 1 to the Wound roll as well if that model’s unit is Below Half-strength. In addition, while a TYRANIDS MONSTER unit from your army (excluding Battle-shocked units) is at its Starting Strength, add 2 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

detachment_rules.name: Insurmountable Odds
detachment_rules.summary: Each time an enemy unit is selected to shoot, after that unit has finished making its attacks, if one or more models from one or more Endless Multitude units from your army were destroyed as a result of those attacks, each such unit can make a Surge move. To do so, roll one D6: that unit can be moved a distance in inches up to the result, but that unit must end that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit (excluding AIRCRAFT ). When doing so, those models can be moved within Engagement Range of enemy units. A unit cannot make a Surge move while it is Battle-shocked.

detachment_rules.name: Feed the Swarm
detachment_rules.summary:
In your Command phase, each Harvester unit from your army can Regenerate one friendly TYRANIDS unit that is within 6" of it. A unit can only be regenerated once per phase. Each time a unit regenerates, do one of the following:
- One model in that unit regains up to D3+1 lost wounds.
- One destroyed Infantry model (excluding Characters) is returned to that unit with its full wounds remaining. If that unit is an Endless Multitude unit, up to 3 destroyed models are returned instead.

detachment_rules.name: Questing Tendrils
detachment_rules.summary: TYRANIDS units with this ability are eligible to charge in a turn in which they Fell Back. Vanguard Invader units with this ability are eligible to charge in a turn in which they Advanced.

detachment_rules.name: Synaptic Imperatives
detachment_rules.summary:
At the start of the battle round, you can select one of the Synaptic Imperatives shown below. Until the end of the battle round, that Synaptic Imperative is active for your army and while a TYRANIDS unit from your army is within Synapse Range of your army, it will benefit from it. Each Synaptic Imperative can only be selected once per battle.
- Synaptic Augmentation: While this unit is within Synapse Range of your army, models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.
- Surging Vitality: While this unit is within Synapse Range of your army, add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for this unit.
- Goaded to Slaughter: While this unit is within Synapse Range of your army, each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Power of the Hive Mind
enhancements.summary:
Tyranids Psyker model only. Improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of psychic weapons equipped by the bearer by 1.

Points: 10

enhancements.name: Alien Cunning
enhancements.summary:
TYRANIDS model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three TYRANIDS units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

Points: 30

enhancements.name: Regenerating Monstrosity
enhancements.summary:
TYRANIDS model only (excluding Monsters models). The bearer’s unit can be regenerated up to twice per phase, instead of once.

Points: 20

enhancements.name: Ominous Presence
enhancements.summary:
Tyranids Monster model only. Add 3 to the bearer’s Objective Control characteristic.

Points: 15

enhancements.name: Hunting Grounds
enhancements.summary:
TYRANIDS model only. While the bearer is on the battlefield, each time your opponent sets up a Reserves unit on the battlefield, roll one D6: on a 2+, that unit must take a Battle-shock test.

Points: 20

enhancements.name: Relentless Hunger
enhancements.summary:
TYRANIDS model only. Add 2" to the Move characteristic of models in the bearer’s unit.

Points: 20

enhancements.name: Enraged Reserves
enhancements.summary:
Tyranids Monster model only. If the bearer is destroyed by a melee attack, if it has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 3+, do not remove it from play. It can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

Points: 20

enhancements.name: Perfectly Adapted
enhancements.summary:
TYRANIDS model only. Once per turn, you can re-roll one Hit roll, one Wound roll, one Damage roll, one Advance roll, one Charge roll or one saving throw made for the bearer.

Points: 15

enhancements.name: Naturalised Camouflage
enhancements.summary:
TYRANIDS model only. At the start of the first battle round, select up to three friendly Endless Multitude units within 9" of the bearer. Until the end of the battle round, each time a ranged attack targets one of those units, models in that unit have the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

Points: 30

enhancements.name: Instinctive Defence
enhancements.summary:
TYRANIDS model only. While the bearer is within 6" of one or more friendly Harvester units, you can target the bearer’s unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP. In addition, while the bearer is within 6" of one or more friendly HARVESTER units, models in the bearer’s unit have the Fights First ability.

Points: 15

enhancements.name: Chameleonic
enhancements.summary:
Vanguard Invader model only. The bearer has the Stealth ability and each time a ranged attack targets the bearer’s unit, models in that unit have the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

Points: 15

enhancements.name: Psychostatic Disruption
enhancements.summary:
Tyranids Synapse model only. Enemy units that arrive on the battlefield from Reserves cannot be set up within 12" of the bearer. In addition, once per battle, during the first or second battle round, when your opponent declares that a unit will arrive on the battlefield from Strategic Reserves, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, roll one D6: on a 4+, that enemy unit cannot arrive on the battlefield this turn.

Points: 30

enhancements.name: Biophagic Flow (Aura)
enhancements.summary:
TYRANIDS model only. While a friendly Harvester model is within 12" of the bearer, when using the Feed the Swarm ability, that HARVESTER model can Regenerate one friendly TYRANIDS unit that is within 9" of it, instead of one within 6".

Points: 10

enhancements.name: Stalker
enhancements.summary:
Vanguard Invader model only. At the start of the battle, select one enemy unit. Each time the bearer makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.

Points: 10

enhancements.name: Piercing Talons
enhancements.summary:
TYRANIDS model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack, on a Critical Wound, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

Points: 25

enhancements.name: Null Nodules
enhancements.summary:
Tyranids Monster model only. Once per battle, when a Psychic Attack is allocated to the bearer, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, the bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against Psychic Attacks.

Points: 10

enhancements.name: Synaptic Linchpin
enhancements.summary:
TYRANIDS model only. While a friendly TYRANIDS unit is within 9" of the bearer, that unit is within Synapse Range of your army.

Points: 20

enhancements.name: Synaptic Control
enhancements.summary:
Tyranids Synapse model only. Each time an attack is allocated to the bearer, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

Points: 20

enhancements.name: Neuronode
enhancements.summary:
TYRANIDS model only. After both players have deployed their armies, you can select up to three Vanguard Invader units from your army and redeploy all of those units. When doing so, any of those units can be placed into Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

Points: 20

enhancements.name: The Dirgeheart of Kharis (Aura)
enhancements.summary:
Tyranids Synapse model only. While an enemy unit is within 9" of the bearer, worsen that units Leadership characteristic by 1.

Points: 15

enhancements.name: Monstrous Nemesis
enhancements.summary:
Tyranids Monster model only. Each time the bearer makes a melee attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, add 1 to the Wound roll.

Points: 25

enhancements.name: Adaptive Biology
enhancements.summary:
TYRANIDS model only. The bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability. At the start of any turn, if the bearer has fewer than its starting number of wounds remaining, until the end of the battle, it has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability instead.

Points: 25

enhancements.name: Adrenalised Onslaught
enhancements.summary:
TYRANIDS model only. Each time the bearer’s unit Piles In or Consolidates, models in this unit can move an additional 3".

Points: 15

enhancements.name: Parasitic Biomorphology
enhancements.summary:
TYRANIDS model only. Add 1 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit. The first time the bearer’s unit destroys an enemy unit in the Fight phase while the bearer is within 6" of one or more friendly Harvester units, until the end of the battle, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit.

Points: 25
